demo_script: Run python3 scripts/check_product.py and show PASS output.
Show continuation_plan.json to prove the product knows what must continue.
Show investor/vc_pitch_deck.md and diligence_room_index.md for the VC conversation.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Run buyer discovery and attach notes or no-fit evidence before claiming demand.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: 10 to 15 dated importer, broker, operator, or sourcing lead conversations.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Convert warm operator interest into a dated pilot-intent or rejection note.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: At least one written design-partner or pilot-intent artifact.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Have a qualified reviewer inspect the country matrix and pitch claims.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: Qualified customs, food safety, and claims-language review.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Document data rights and repeatable refresh proof before scaling beyond fixtures.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: Source-rights, refresh cadence, and allowed-use proof for official and commercial sources.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Validate willingness to pay during buyer discovery and update the pitch packet.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: Pricing hypothesis, ICP, sales motion, and first 90-day experiment plan.

diligence_lanes.next_valid_move: Confirm fundraising terms with counsel before sending investor documents.
diligence_lanes.required_evidence: Entity, IP, cap table, financing terms, and securities-law review.

draft_funding_ask.boundary: Draft planning assumption only; not an offering document or legal/financial advice.
draft_funding_ask.instrument: draft pre-seed SAFE or equivalent, subject to counsel
use_of_funds: qualified compliance review and claim-boundary design
security, audit, and GitHub/SRG/code-review graph integration

investor_sources.claim: Global trade is a large, active market with current WTO forecasts and statistics published for 2025 and 2026.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use for market context only; do not use as TAM/SAM/SOM proof without a separate Canadian market model.
investor_sources.source_name: World Trade Organization Global Trade Outlook and Statistics

investor_sources.claim: Canada provides official trade-data tooling for customized reports on Canadian and U.S. goods trade with over 200 countries.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use to support data-source availability; do not claim Canadian revenue market size until a dated TAM model is produced.

investor_sources.claim: The Canadian Importers Database provides importer-discovery orientation by product, city, and country of origin.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use for discovery only; do not claim buyer validation, supplier recommendation, or current customer intent.

investor_sources.claim: Canadian commercial import work requires preparation, classification, duty/tax review, shipping, examination, reporting, and release workflows.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use to explain workflow complexity; do not provide customs, tariff, or import/export advice.
investor_sources.source_name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

investor_sources.claim: Canada publishes a 2026 Customs Tariff and tariff-classification guidance through CBSA.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use as official orientation; product classification and tariff treatment require qualified review.

investor_sources.claim: CFIA AIRS is a reference tool for Canadian import requirements for CFIA-regulated commodities.
investor_sources.claim_boundary: Use to explain why qualified food-import review matters; do not claim CFIA approval or compliance readiness.

next_valid_move: Use the pitch packet for private VC conversations while opening buyer discovery, design-partner, compliance, data-rights, business-model, and financing diligence lanes.
one_line: A blocked-safe operator copilot that turns importer/exporter source packets into readiness status, evidence lanes, and next valid moves before teams overclaim.

pitch_claims.boundary: Problem framing only; not legal, customs, tariff, supplier, or buyer advice.
pitch_claims.claim: Import/export source work has real proof gaps across official sources, country rules, buyer validation, contracts, and qualified review.

pitch_claims.boundary: Demo readiness only; not external operational readiness.
pitch_claims.claim: The local product loop can demonstrate blocked-safe source-card evaluation, operator dashboard output, continuation lanes, and proof gates.

pitch_claims.boundary: Strategy hypothesis pending buyer discovery and design partners.
pitch_claims.claim: The wedge is internal operator readiness for import/export source packets before teams make public, commercial, supplier, or compliance claims.

proof_boundary: This report supports an honest private VC pitch. It does not prove traction, revenue, legal/compliance approval, supplier readiness, customs/tariff advice, public launch readiness, or external operational readiness.
